content: The error is `themeRegistry[0]` is `undefined`: emptying `data/store/themes.ts` **also emptied the theme registry**, because `theme/registry.ts` derives the app's themes from it

App created on both stores and permissions added — now I can resolve the last blocked item: the App Store Connect **numeric App ID** (it only existed as `<TODO>` because the listing didn't exist yet), and verify both store API connections actually work end-to-end
